overview: Vermont Integrative MD is a membership-based family medicine practice combining conventional and integrative medicine. Dr. Bazel delivers care focused on prevention and addressing root causes of disease through extended visits and individualized treatment plans.
highlights: Membership-based practice with no insurance copays, deductibles, or co-insurance
Extended initial visits (1-1.5 hours) emphasizing lifestyle interventions and mind-body techniques
targetAudience: Patients seeking family medicine with an integrative health approach, prevention focus, and extended visit time outside the traditional insurance-based model.
